children.text: XGBoost is tested as challenger, not assumed to be the final rate basis.

First run: train AUC 0.635, test AUC 0.555
Regularized: train AUC 0.589, test AUC 0.561

Slightly better frequency ranking, but weaker pure premium A/E
and loss-ratio calibration.
Therefore XGBoost remains a challenger risk score and monitoring benchmark, not the champion pricing formula.
